pi_items.verified_value: Task instruction value referring to a real place (Riverside County, California) where genuine community needs assessments do exist
pi_items.source: Web search confirms multiple organizations in Riverside County conduct Community Needs Assessments. However, this is a task requirement for a simulated survey creation task, not a claim about a specific real dataset.

pi_items.verified_value: INCORRECT. Official Riverside County government domain is rivco.org, NOT riversidecounty.gov. The URL specified in metadata does not correspond to any valid official Riverside County website. Correct domain would be https://rivco.org/ or related rivco.org subpaths.
pi_items.source: Web search results confirm official Riverside County website is at rivco.org (verified by multiple official county department URLs: rivco.org, rivcocob.org, rivcoacr.org). Web search specifically shows 'riversidecounty.gov' does not appear in official county web addresses. Attempted access to https://www.riversidecounty.gov/community-resources resulted in connection failure.

pi_items.verified_value: FICTIONAL. The domain 'riverside-sociology.edu' does not exist. UC Riverside Sociology Department uses @ucr.edu domain (verified faculty emails follow pattern: jan.stets@ucr.edu, klinsley@ucr.edu, becky.campbell@ucr.edu). Department website is sociology.ucr.edu, not riverside-sociology.edu.
pi_items.source: Multiple web searches for 'riverside-sociology.edu' found no results for this domain. Web search for 'Riverside Sociology department email domain' confirms UC Riverside uses @ucr.edu exclusively. Direct searches for 'riverside-sociology.edu site' returned no matching pages, only UC Riverside domains (sociology.ucr.edu). Domain appears to be fictional or unregistered.

pi_items.verified_value: Task requirement values match stated requirements in task.json description field
pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: 'Welcome Message: Must include the text "Riverside County" AND "voluntary" (informed consent)'

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task using a local LimeSurvey installation. The task contains two metadata claims with incorrect values: (1) The end URL references 'riversidecounty.gov' but Riverside County's official domain is 'rivco.org', making the URL fictitious. (2) The admin email uses 'riverside-sociology.edu' domain which does not exist; UC Riverside Sociology uses '@ucr.edu' email domain. The survey title references Riverside County, a real California county, though this is a task instruction not a data claim. All keyword requirements in the metadata are correctly stated task instructions.
